items.title: US - Iran peace deal - Iran says Strait of Hormuz cannot be reopened through war or American transgressions

Our warriors continue imposing long-range sanctions on Russian enterprises and facilities fueling the war. An oil refinery was hit in Bashkortostan, approximately 1,300 kilometers from the front line. I thank the units of the Special Operations Forces of the Armed Forces of Ukraine and the Security Service of Ukraine for their accuracy. In the Krasnodar region, warriors of the Unmanned Systems Forces, the Defense Intelligence of Ukraine, and the Security Service of Ukraine struck the Afipsky Oil Refinery, approximately 400 kilometers from the front line. Mid-range strikes have also delivered results. In Gelendzhik, a patrol ship and a shadow fleet tanker were hit – effective work by the Ukrainian Navy, approximately 430 kilometers from the front line. Successful strikes were also carried out against three shadow fleet tankers in the Sea of Azov. I thank all our warriors whose successful operations are bringing the war back to where it came from. This war must be brought to an end, and all reasonable diplomatic proposals are on the table.

items.title: EU bans gold imports from Sudan to curb money financing the war
items.summary: The ban also restricts exports of mercury and cyanide to Sudan, chemicals widely used in gold mining.

items.title: India Refiners Reap Fuel Export Windfall as War Drives Shortages
items.summary: Oil-product shipments from India are on track to climb to their highest level since September as refiners cash in on robust profit margins after a Russian export ban and hostilities in the Middle East tightened supplies.

items.title: China is deeply concerned over resumed military conflict in the #Gulf region. Parties need to heed the strong call for peace and stability, exercise restraint, safeguard the hard-won ceasefire, avoid the return of war and more importantly, prevent the fighting from spreading and hurting more innocent people. The world hopes to see the lawful rights and interest of the coastal countries respected and normal and safe passage resumed. China will continue to act in line with the four propositions put forward by President Xi Jinping and work for deescalation and stability in the region.
